description: Incremental expansion plan for production-grade SEC 10-K item extraction evaluation.

phases.name: seed_boundary_lock
phases.goal: Keep the 20 downloaded filings as a stable regression baseline.

phases.name: core_item_expansion
phases.goal: Add verified boundaries for nearby and high-value sections.
exit_criteria: all recovery actions have contract metadata

phases.name: industry_breadth
phases.goal: Expand each represented industry from two companies to five companies.

phases.name: time_depth
phases.goal: Expand each selected company to five time points across roughly twenty years.
